data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Simplifying decision-making to enhance the user experience.
data.technical_spec: Minimalist design for navigation menus and checkout processes.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Optimizing the size and distance of interactive elements for ease of use.
data.technical_spec: Large clickable areas for 'Add to Cart' and 'Buy Now' buttons.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: Leveraging users' familiarity with design patterns seen on other sites.
data.technical_spec: Consistent use of breadcrumb navigation and familiar web page layouts.

data.title: Miller's Law
data.description: Organizing information in manageable chunks to improve cognitive load handling.
data.technical_spec: Product details grouped into tabbed interfaces and bullet points.

data.title: Serial Position Effect
data.description: Strategically placing key information at the beginning and end of user journeys.
data.technical_spec: Prominent display of discounts at the top and primary call-to-action at the end of pages.
